mano_cua.result_summary: setTiles()调用后图层完全消失: 执行src.setTiles(src.tiles)重设相同tiles URL后，连续120帧canvas读取全部为空白(BLANK FRAME 120/120)。矢量瓦片图层在source更新时没有保持旧瓦片显示，直接清空导致闪烁/消失。控制台还有预存错误'Expected value to be of type number, but found null instead'。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After calling setTiles() with the same tiles URL, monitored 120 consecutive frames and all were blank. Vector tile layer disappears completely during source update instead of maintaining old tiles. Confirms the reported bug about layer display discontinuity when updating vector tile source.
